summary: Audited 4 deal-related agents, identified overlap in meeting→deal routing between Deal Sync & Meeting Router and Acquisition Deal Tracking. Paused the redundant Acquisition Deal Tracking agent. Kept 3 agents with clear MECE responsibilities.

results.recommended_structure: 3-agent architecture: (1) Deal Sync & Meeting Router [6h] handles external source sync + meeting routing, (2) Deal Intelligence Notion Sync [3x/day] handles bidirectional Notion↔deals.db sync, (3) Daily Email Deal Scan [7am] handles Gmail signal detection. Each has unique MECE responsibility.

actions_taken: edit_agent(259a13c8-565a-4472-88f3-60a6d22131dc, active=false) - Paused Acquisition Deal Tracking due to overlap with Deal Sync & Meeting Router
